form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran last at Naas on March 4 over 3218m, 36 len behind Bokamsin carrying 69.5kg at $151. Second run from a spell ran last in a small field at Navan on March 21 over 4526m, slow track; 31 len behind Shabby Hill carrying 70kg at $201. Prefer to watch at this stage. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Freshened for 35 days. Last run finished ninth of 15 runners at Naas in the LR on March 8 over 5029m, 67 len behind The Lovely Man carrying 61kg at $9. The run before finished fourth of 8 starters at Gowran Park on February 14 over 3922m, on heavy track; 12 len behind King Alexander with 75.5kg at $9.50. Gets a chance to win. Rates better here and worth another chance.

form.formComment: Resuming today after three months. Finished off last preparation 8 of 14 runners at Thurles January 18 over 4224m, 22 len behind Rising Dust with 76.5kg at $9. First up last campaign 7 of 15 starters at Fairyhouse November 29 over 4325m, 42 len behind Jimmy Du Seuil carrying 75.5kg at $19. Sure to prove tough to stop.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after three months finished tenth of 23 runners at Cheltenham on March 12 over 5330m, 13 len behind Ask Brewster with 71.5kg at $13. Previously second-up finished seventh of 18 starters at Listowel in the G3 on September 24 over 4828m, 20 len behind Spanish Harlem with 69kg at $12. Forgive first-up failure. Fitter and will be tough to beat this time.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming pulled up at Limerick on February 10 over 3118m. Last start finished seventh of 8 runners at Clonmel on February 26 over 3319m, on a wet track; 12 len behind Fenway Park carrying 66.5kg at $41. Confidence may have taken a hit.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth of 18 starters at this track on March 17 over 4123m, 16 len behind Let Him B carrying 67kg at $21. Race before finished seventh of 11 runners at Thurles on January 18 over 4023m, 24 len behind Hillberry Hill with 68.5kg at $101. Has been racing well. Cannot be left out in this more suitable contest.
